info.title: Reconmap API
info.description: RESTful API for Reconmap, an open-source vulnerability assessment and penetration testing platform. Manages projects, tasks, commands, vulnerabilities, targets, reports, users, clients, documents, notes, and audit logs. Supports JWT Bearer token authentication.

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns JWT access and refresh tokens.

bearerAuth.description: JWT Bearer token authentication. Obtain token via POST /users/login.
